methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: ERC20 baseToken held by AccountingManager (vault underlying)
ERC20 tokens held by connectors (strategy-held assets, reward tokens like CRV/CVX/PRISMA/BAL/AURA/etc.)
ERC20 LP tokens (Curve LP, Balancer BPT, Pendle LP, Aerodrome LP, etc.) held by connectors
ERC721 Uniswap V3 position NFTs held by UNIv3Connector
Native ETH held by MaverickConnector (receive()) and possibly AccountingManager via rescue(ETH)
Protocol positions/claims: staked LP in gauges/reward pools (Curve gauge, Convex reward pool, Prisma deposit token, Aura reward pool, Penpie staking)
Borrowed debt positions (FraxPair debt, Morpho Blue borrow, registry marks debt positions impacting TVL netting)
Fees: withdrawal fee in baseToken, management/performance fee minted as shares, fee receivers (NoyaFeeReceiver contracts) controlling withdrawal/burn of shares
state_assets: AccountingManager depositQueue (queue mapping + indices first/middle/last + totalAWFDeposit)
AccountingManager withdrawRequestsByAddress mapping (share amount locked against transfers/withdraws)
AccountingManager currentWithdrawGroup struct (isStarted/isFullfilled, lastId, totalCBAmount, totalABAmount, totalCBAmountFullfilled)

AccountingManager profit/fee accounting: totalDepositedAmount, totalWithdrawnAmount, storedProfitForFee, profitStoredTime, lastFeeDistributionTime, totalProfitCalculated, preformanceFeeSharesWaitingForDistribution
AccountingManager config: depositWaitingTime, withdrawWaitingTime, depositLimitTotalAmount, depositLimitPerTransaction, fee rates, fee receivers, valueOracle
ERC4626/ERC20 share balances, allowances, totalSupply (AccountingManager share token)
PositionRegistry.vaults[vaultId] including: accountManager, baseToken, governer, maintainer, maintainerWithoutTimeLock, keeperContract, watcherContract, emergency, enabled flags
PositionRegistry connectors config per vault: enabled flag + trustedTokens mapping
PositionRegistry trustedPositionsBP mapping (PositionBP: calculatorConnector, positionTypeId, onlyOwner, isEnabled, isDebt, data, additionalData)
PositionRegistry holdingPositions array + isPositionUsed index mapping + positionTimestamp fields
SwapAndBridgeHandler routes array + enable flags + slippageTolerance pair mapping + genericSlippageTolerance + isEligibleToUse mapping
Keepers multisig state: isOwner mapping, nonce, threshold, numOwners
Value oracles state: NoyaValueOracle defaultPriceSource, priceSource, priceRoutes; ChainlinkOracleConnector assetsSources + chainlinkPriceAgeThreshold; UniswapValueOracle assetToBaseToPool + period
privilege_assets: Registry roles (AccessControl): GOVERNER_ROLE (admin of all roles), MAINTAINER_ROLE, EMERGENCY_ROLE
Per-vault governance addresses (governer, maintainer, maintainerWithoutTimeLock, keeperContract, watcherContract, emergency) used by NoyaGovernanceBase modifiers
AccountingManager privileged actions via NoyaGovernanceBase: onlyManager, onlyMaintainer, onlyEmergency, onlyMaintainerOrEmergency, onlyEmergencyOrWatcher, onlyGovernance
SwapAndBridgeHandler privileged actions: onlyMaintainer / onlyMaintainerOrEmergency; eligibility list controlling executeSwap/executeBridge
Connector privileged actions: onlyManager (strategy execution) and onlyMaintainer (config updates)
NoyaFeeReceiver ownership (Ownable): onlyOwner can withdrawShares/burnShares (controls realized fee extraction)
Keepers ownership (Ownable2Step): onlyOwner can updateOwners/setThreshold; execute requires msg.sender is an owner and valid signatures
TimelockController admin/roles (NoyaTimeLock): proposer/executor/admin privileges (external governance surface)
reputation_assets: Vault share token supply/distribution (AccountingManager ERC20 shares) representing depositor stake and protocol accounting integrity
Performance/management fee share minting (impacts perceived fairness and governance trust)
Keeper multisig authorization correctness (protocol execution trust)
Oracle routing integrity (price correctness and TVL correctness trust)

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: AccountingManager: ERC4626 -> ERC20 (OZ v5) + ReentrancyGuard + Pausable (OZ) + NoyaGovernanceBase. PositionRegistry: AccessControl (OZ) + ReentrancyGuard. NoyaFeeReceiver: Ownable. Keepers: EIP712 + Ownable2Step (and Ownable via constructor) . Watchers: Keepers. NoyaTimeLock: TimelockController. BaseConnector: NoyaGovernanceBase + IConnector + ReentrancyGuard. Protocol-specific connectors (Curve/Pendle/Balancer/Maverick/Aerodrome/Frax/UNIv3/MorphoBlue) inherit BaseConnector; UNIv3 also ERC721Holder; Maverick implements IERC721Receiver. SwapAndBridgeHandler: NoyaGovernanceBase + ReentrancyGuard. Oracles implement INoyaValueOracle; Chainlink/Uniswap connectors are governed via Registry MAINTAINER_ROLE.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin Contracts v5 (ERC4626, ERC20, SafeERC20, ReentrancyGuard, AccessControl, Ownable, Ownable2Step, Pausable, TimelockController, EIP712, ECDSA, ERC721Holder)
Uniswap V3 core/periphery (factory, pools, oracle observe, position manager)
Pendle interfaces/libraries (IPMarket, routers, static router, oracle libs)
Morpho Blue IMorpho + oracle interface + SharesMathLib
Custom Swap/Bridge route implementations via ISwapAndBridgeImplementation (untrusted external calls via routes)
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: No proxy, beacon, UUPS, or diamond constructs are present in the provided contracts. All are deployed as regular implementation contracts; governance changes occur via Registry role management and per-vault address updates rather than upgrades.
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Two-layer control: (1) Global Registry AccessControl roles (GOVERNER_ROLE admin; MAINTAINER_ROLE; EMERGENCY_ROLE). (2) Per-vault governance addresses stored in PositionRegistry.vaults[vaultId] and enforced by NoyaGovernanceBase modifiers: onlyManager (keeperContract OR emergency OR registry.flashLoan), onlyMaintainer, onlyGovernance, onlyEmergency, onlyMaintainerOrEmergency, onlyEmergencyOrWatcher. Connectors and managers rely on Registry.isAddressTrusted/isAnActiveConnector. SwapAndBridgeHandler has its own isEligibleToUse gate plus NoyaGovernanceBase maintainer/emergency gates for admin actions.

external_calls: previewDeposit(amount) (ERC4626 math uses totalAssets->TVL external calls)
previewRedeem(shares) (ERC4626 math uses totalAssets->TVL external calls)
ETH transfer via call if token==0

entry_points.function: inherited TimelockController external/public methods (schedule, execute, cancel, updateDelay, grantRole, revokeRole, renounceRole, etc.)

state_changes: PositionRegistry holding positions updates per token via _updateTokenInRegistry
PositionRegistry holding positions updates per token via _updateTokenInRegistry

external_calls: _getPositionTVL (virtual view; in derived connectors makes external protocol calls)
oracle.getValue(...) via selected underlying oracle(s) in route/default mappings

upgradeability_surface.notes: Constructor-based initialization; no proxy. Inherits OZ ERC4626/ERC20/ReentrancyGuard/Pausable.
Constructor-based AccessControl registry; role admin is GOVERNER_ROLE.
No proxy; route list and eligibility are admin-controlled surfaces.
No proxy; strategy risk concentrated in onlyManager + external protocol calls.
Multisig wallet contract; no upgrade mechanism.
TimelockController instance; governance surface via inherited scheduling/execution functions.
Oracle router with admin-controlled sources and routes; no proxy.
Chainlink adapter; maintainer controls feeds and staleness threshold.
Uniswap TWAP oracle; maintainer controls pools and observation period.
Ownable fee receiver; can initiate withdrawals/burns of shares from AccountingManager.
